summary.short_summary: This chapter introduces the main ideas of Three Dimensional Geometry in mathematics.
summary.detailed_summary: This chapter for Class 12 mathematics explains the core concepts of Three Dimensional Geometry. It is intended as a structured study summary for CBSE learners.
